description_long: This is a small, quaint bank building with a steeply pitched blue shingle roof and a prominent red brick chimney. The structure features a timber-framed facade with visible wooden beams and a single wooden door at the front, flanked by a grid-patterned window. The roof extends over a side annex, which is also covered in blue shingles and bordered by brown trim. The walls are finished in a light gray plaster, contrasting with the dark wood and vibrant roof. The overall design is reminiscent of a rustic, storybook cottage, suggesting a traditional or historical setting. No visible signage or modern security features are present, giving the building a charming, old-world appearance.
description: A small, rustic bank building with a steep blue shingle roof, red brick chimney, and timber-framed facade. Features a single wooden door and a grid-patterned window.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a wooden door, grid-patterned window, and the steep blue roof with brown trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue shingle roof, the annex extension, and the prominent red brick chimney at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full height of the red brick chimney, the intersecting rooflines, and the side annex.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the wide expanse of the blue shingle roof and the annex, with no visible doors or windows.
attribute_entrance_design: Single wooden door with vertical planks, framed by timber beams, and a small grid-patterned window adjacent; no decorative or security elements visible.
